flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Fullerton College rose 59% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.8k → $12.4k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Fullerton College rose 30% between 2007 and 2010 ($3.5k → $4.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Fullerton College rose 29% between 2007 and 2010 ($508 → $656).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Fullerton College fell 99% between 2021 and 2024 (9.3% → 0.1%).
